route_a.name: End-to-End Provider Compliance
route_a.estimand: Probability that a Provider completes delivery, representation, and Boundary semantic contracts without repair under the frozen V3 execution policy.
route_a.valid_comparison: Models or Providers executed under byte-identical V3 Prompt, Protocol, Parser, and policy.
route_a.prohibited_interpretation: A Level 0 or Level 1 failure must not be reported as Boundary inability.

route_b.name: Boundary Extraction Capability
route_b.estimand: Boundary semantic performance after a separately frozen deterministic representation-normalization layer.
allowed_future_normalization_constraints: Deterministic only; no model call or semantic rewriting.
Model identity aliases must be enumerated before execution.
Markdown fence removal may be allowed only when exactly one unambiguous JSON payload exists.
No missing-field invention, excerpt rewriting, span repair, label repair, or selective retry.
Normalized and original content hashes must both be recorded even when raw content retention remains prohibited.
route_b.prohibited_comparison: Route B normalized success rates must not be pooled with or presented as Route A V3 end-to-end compliance rates.
